2603.21065.title: LongCat-Flash-Prover: Advancing Native Formal Reasoning via Agentic Tool-Integrated Reinforcement Learning
2603.21065.paper_summary: We introduce LongCat-Flash-Prover, a flagship 560-billion-parameter open-source Mixture-of- Experts (MoE) model that advances Native Formal Reasoning in Lean4 through agentic tool-integrated reasoning (TIR). We decompose the native formal reasoning task into three independent formal capabilities, i.e., auto-formalization, sketching, and proving. To facilitate these capabilities, we propose a Hybrid-Experts Iteration Framework to expand high-quality task trajectories, including generating a formal statement based on a given informal problem, producing a whole-proof directly from the statement, or a lemma-style sketch. During agentic RL, we present a Hierarchical Importance Sampling Policy Optimization (HisPO) algorithm, which aims to stabilize the MoE model training on such long-horizon tasks. It employs a gradient masking strategy that accounts for the policy staleness and the inherent train-inference engine discrepancies at both sequence and token levels. Additionally, we also incorporate theorem consistency and legality detection mechanisms to eliminate reward hacking issues. Extensive evaluations show that our LongCat-Flash-Prover sets a new state-of-the-art for open-weights models in both auto-formalization and theorem proving. Demonstrating remarkable sample efficiency, it achieves a 97.1% pass rate on MiniF2F-Test using only 72 inference budget per problem. On more challenging benchmarks, it solves 70.8% of ProverBench and 41.5% of PutnamBench with no more than 220 attempts per problem, significantly outperforming existing open-weights baselines.
2603.21065.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 LongCat-Flash-Prover，一個擁有 5600 億參數的旗艦開源混合專家（MoE）模型，通過代理工具整合推理（TIR）推進 Lean4 的原生形式推理。我們將原生形式推理任務分解為三個獨立的形式能力，即自動形式化、草圖繪製和證明。為了促進這些能力，我們提出了一個混合專家迭代框架，以擴展高質量的任務軌跡，包括根據給定的非正式問題生成正式陳述、直接從陳述中產生完整證明，或生成引理風格的草圖。在代理強化學習過程中，我們提出了一種分層重要性取樣策略優化（HisPO）算法，旨在穩定 MoE 模型在這類長期任務上的訓練。它採用了一種梯度遮蔽策略，考慮了策略過時和序列及標記層面固有的訓練-推理引擎差異。此外，我們還納入了定理一致性和合法性檢測機制，以消除獎勵黑客問題。廣泛的評估顯示，我們的 LongCat-Flash-Prover 在自動形式化和定理證明方面設立了開放權重模型的新最先進水平。它展示了卓越的樣本效率，在 MiniF2F-Test 上僅使用 72 次推理預算即可達到 97.1% 的通過率。在更具挑戰性的基準測試中，它在 ProverBench 上解決了 70.8% 的問題，並在 PutnamBench 上解決了 41.5% 的問題，每個問題的嘗試次數不超過 220 次，顯著優於現有的開放權重基準。
2603.21065.author: Jianing Wang et.al.
